title: Firing outside Guru Randhawa's gym; Bishnoi gang claims Salman Khan connection behind attack
content: A chilling social media post, attributed to the Lawrence Bishnoi syndicate, claims responsibility for a Delhi gym firing. The motive cited is the target's alleged closeness to actor Salman Khan, a known adversary of the gang. The post warns of further action against enemies and traitors, with security agencies on high alert.

title: Watch: US unleashes 49 Tomahawk missiles in fresh 'self-defence' strikes on Iran
content: The US Central Command released video of self-defense strikes against Iranian military targets, including radar and air defense sites. The operation, involving 49 Tomahawk missiles, was a response to Iran's alleged aggression threatening US forces and international shipping. This marks a significant escalation in regional tensions.

title: The Siraj workload question: How India created cricket's busiest fast bowler
content: Mohammed Siraj's withdrawal from the England and Ireland T20Is raised a curious question: how could a bowler who had drifted out of India's white-ball plans suddenly need rest? The answer lies in the format India have simply refused to play without him. While Jasprit Bumrah's workload was carefully managed, Siraj quietly became India's default fast bowler and the busiest quick in world cricket. For three years, he has been India's workhorse. Now, workload management has finally reached him too.

title: India slashes excise duty on ethanol-blended petrol: Key details
content: India has waived excise duty on blended petrol containing 22-30% ethanol as part of a push to increase ethanol usage. This move coincides with rising fuel prices due to the Middle East crisis, prompting plans for discounted E85 fuel and continued availability of E20 petrol nationwide.

title: Microsoft warns staff: Don't touch Claude Fable 5, lawyers are still reading fine print
content: Microsoft has blocked its own employees from using Anthropic's newly launched Claude Fable 5 inside GitHub Copilot, citing unresolved concerns over a 30-day data retention policy tied to the Mythos-class model. The Verge reports Microsoft's legal team is still reviewing the changes, even as paying Copilot and Foundry customers already have access. Other Claude models remain available internally under Zero Data Retention rules. Anthropic has not offered a workaround.

title: ITR filing FY26: What is Form 26AS & what if it has errors? Things taxpayers should do
content: First, let’s understand what Form 26AS is – it’s essentially a tax statement that is linked to the taxpayer’s PAN. It shows details of tax dedicated at source and tax collected at source. It’s a key document that is essential for taxpayers when filing their income tax return.

title: 4 Bangladeshi men hold Gurgaon family hostage and rob them, arrested
content: Four Bangladeshi men were arrested in Gurgaon for a house robbery and hostage situation last week. The accused, with multiple prior criminal cases, attempted to flee during their apprehension, sustaining injuries. They had planned to escape to Bangladesh after stealing valuables worth approximately Rs 9 lakh.

title: Bill Gates warns Microsoft, Amazon, Google on data center push
content: Bill Gates has told the AI industry it does not have permission to drive up household electricity bills, warning Amazon, Google, Meta and Microsoft that the old utility-funded grid model is finished. Speaking on CNBC, the Microsoft co-founder said hyperscalers must now pick data centre sites where the economics and politics hold. With 48 projects worth $156 billion already blocked in 2025 and public opposition at record highs, the buildout is colliding with sentiment.

title: IMD issues thunderstorm, hailstorm alert for Delhi-NCR
content: Delhi experienced a pleasant weather shift on Thursday, offering respite from intense heat. The IMD forecasts a wet spell across northwest India until June 13, with thunderstorms, gusty winds up to 60 kmph, and potential hailstorms on June 11-12. Rainfall is expected to spread across Punjab, Haryana, Delhi, Uttar Pradesh, and Rajasthan from June 10-14.

title: Bengaluru: Ice cream spill led to assault on 6-year-old, mother's boyfriend confesses
content: A six-year-old girl's death in Bengaluru has been solved with her mother's live-in partner confessing to hitting her in the stomach and muffling her cries after she spilled ice cream. The combined trauma led to the child's death. The accused is in police custody, while the mother remains elusive.

title: Jeff Bezos' 'good bye' post returns as Seattle slips in US city ranking
content: Seattle, once a top US city for foreign investment, has plummeted to 13th place, sparking concern among tech leaders. This decline follows a new state tax on millionaires and a perceived anti-business climate. Prominent figures like Jeff Bezos and Howard Schultz have relocated, raising questions about the city's future economic appeal.

title: Days after exposing CBSE portal flaws, 19-year-old Nisarg Adhikary lands role at IIT Kanpur
content: Nineteen-year-old ethical hacker Nisarga Adhikary, who recently highlighted security vulnerabilities in CBSE's digital systems, has been appointed as an OSINT and Threat Intelligence Engineer at IIT Kanpur's C3iHub. Adhikary's role will focus on identifying and analyzing cyber threats using publicly available information, following his public allegations about CBSE's data accessibility.

title: Watch: Ronaldo wastes easy opportunities in Portugal's final match before WC
content: Portugal head into the FIFA World Cup after a 2-1 warm-up win over Nigeria. Cristiano Ronaldo, set for a record-tying sixth World Cup appearance, missed several chances and failed to score before being substituted. Pedro Neto opened the scoring, Akor Adams equalised for Nigeria, and substitute Francisco Conceição netted the winner. Portugal will face Congo, Uzbekistan and Colombia in Group K.

title: Should not have met Epstein, never knew he was engaged in criminal conduct: Gates to lawmakers
content: Bill Gates admitted a "grave error in judgment" for meeting Jeffrey Epstein, testifying voluntarily before lawmakers. He stated he never witnessed or suspected Epstein's criminal conduct, emphasizing his own lack of involvement in any wrongdoing. Gates sought to distance himself, highlighting his philanthropic focus and ending their association in 2014.

title: Drone boat used in US rescue mission in Hormuz built by company co-founded by Indian-American engineer
content: An autonomous drone boat executed a heroic rescue of two US Army Apache helicopter crew members. This revolutionary craft, called Corsair, was designed by Texas-based Saronic Technologies, co-founded by Indian-American Vibhav Altekar.

title: FIFA World Cup opening ceremony: Time, performers & streaming
content: The FIFA World Cup 2026 opening ceremony will feature three major celebrations across Mexico, Canada, and the United States, making it one of the biggest tournament launches in history. Artists including Shakira, Burna Boy, J Balvin, Tyla, Michael Bublé, and Nora Fatehi are set to perform. Fans in India can watch the ceremonies live on Unite8 Sports channels and Zee5. FIFA president Gianni Infantino called the event “a truly global celebration” uniting music, culture, and football.

title: Roger Federer car collection: Luxury cars, SUVs and Mercedes icons
content: Roger Federer still has eyes on him; he has been on the Mercedes-Benz radar since forever and is an embodiment of a luxury lifestyle. He has an array of beautiful sports cars, superior SUVs and luxury cars that beautifully depict his sophisticated personality. He's not a crazy car enthusiast and wants his garage to be appreciated by tennis fans for its performance and usability, which is why his collection is one of the most loved in tennis.

title: Taylor Swift backs the Knicks while Travis Kelce skips NBA Finals Game 4
content: Taylor Swift attended Game 4 of the 2026 NBA Finals at Madison Square Garden on Wednesday, June 11, wearing a "Stevie Knicks" t-shirt alongside Este and Alana Haim. Fiancé Travis Kelce was absent, occupied by the Kansas City Chiefs' mandatory minicamp in Missouri. The visit is layered with significance — Page Six has reported that Swift and Kelce plan to wed at MSG on the July 3 weekend, making Wednesday's outing a preview of sorts at her own future wedding venue.

title: Sutapa Sikdar slams Pranit over viral misogynistic clip: 'Sorry after enjoying like joker?'
content: Sutapa Sikdar has rejected comedian Pranit More's apology for laughing at a misogynistic audience remark about expecting a 'return' after buying biryani. Sikdar questioned the expectation of female forgiveness and stated that such apologies change nothing. More had initially laughed at the comment before issuing a regretful apology, which has now been publicly dismissed. Read on to know more.

title: Air India Ahmedabad crash probe: Final report likely to be delayed by 3 months
content: Investigators are set to miss the one-year deadline for the Air India Boeing 787 crash report, with critical engine analysis still underway in the US. A preliminary report indicated fuel control switches moved to 'CUTOFF' after takeoff, but confusion remains regarding pilot action or technical malfunction.

title: Crude on boil: Oil prices jump over 2% as Iran closes Strait of Hormuz to all vessels
content: Global crude benchmarks surged over 2% as Iran declared the Strait of Hormuz closed to all vessels following fresh US military strikes. Brent crude rose to $95.40 and WTI to $92.63 a barrel. Iran's IRGC warned any vessel attempting to transit the strait would be targeted amid escalating regional tensions.

title: Inside story of Hardik injury: What happened, road ahead, timelines and more
content: Hardik Pandya has been ruled out of India’s ODI series against Afghanistan after suffering a quadricep strain during training at the BCCI Centre of Excellence in Bengaluru. Scans confirmed a sprain requiring at least two weeks of recovery. He will continue rehabilitation at the CoE, with a possible return before the England ODI series. Selectors will also review Virat Kohli’s fitness ahead of squad selection.

title: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi: The sacrifice behind the sensation, ancestral land a father gave
content: When Vaibhav Sooryavanshi’s cricket journey demanded sacrifices, Sanjeev made the toughest decision of his life and sold the ancestral land. Today, at just 15, Vaibhav is an IPL superstar, a key architect of India's Under-19 World Cup triumph and a member of the senior Indian team. The land may be gone, but it has been replaced by pride, respect and the fulfilment of a father's biggest dream.

title: Kaley Cuoco reveals second baby with Tom Pelphrey; fans flood her post
content: Get ready for more adorable moments! Kaley Cuoco and Tom Pelphrey are over the moon to announce they're expecting baby number two, and it's a girl! The couple, already doting parents to three-year-old Matilda, shared the exciting news with a sweet gender reveal cake on social media, much to the delight of their fans.

title: Messi's passport details among data leaked ahead of Argentina's title defence
content: Argentina's World Cup preparations were hit by a reported security lapse that exposed the passport details of the entire squad, including Lionel Messi, after an unredacted team sheet was circulated. Despite the off-field issue, Argentina finished their warm-up campaign strongly with a 3-0 win over Iceland. Goals from Valentin Barco, Messi and Thiago Almada secured victory ahead of their World Cup opener against Algeria.

title: IND vs PAK: Harmanpreet sends 'fearless cricket' message before mega clash
content: Team India is set to begin their ICC Women's T20 World Cup campaign against Pakistan with a fearless approach, according to captain Harmanpreet Kaur. Despite a mixed warm-up, the team gained confidence, particularly from Richa Ghosh's batting, as they aim for their maiden title in the 12-team tournament.

title: Cowboys emerge as suitors for Dolphins All-Pro in blockbuster trade buzz
content: The Dallas Cowboys continue to be linked to Miami Dolphins linebacker Jordyn Brooks as trade speculation grows around the NFL. Brooks, coming off a first-team All-Pro season with 183 tackles, is entering the final year of his $26 million contract while Miami reshapes its roster. FOX Sports insider Greg Auman said a Dallas move feels “inevitable,” though questions remain about trade compensation and whether the Cowboys would commit to a costly long-term extension.

title: 'Peddi' BO day 7: Ram Charan film witnesses midweek decline
content: Ram Charan and Janhvi Kapoor's sports drama 'Peddi' shows a slight weekday dip after a robust opening. The film garnered ₹7.55 crore on its seventh day, bringing its India net collection to ₹187.25 crore. Overseas markets contributed an additional ₹48.80 crore gross, pushing the worldwide total to ₹271.33 crore. Telugu occupancy remains strong.

title: 3 injured in two suspected elephant attacks in Kerala’s Palakkad
content: The suspected elephant attacks occurred a day after a 65-year-old man was killed in a wild elephant attack in Wayanad district

title: Snake Speek Project from Andhra Pradesh among top 50 at National Geographic Slingshot Challenge
content: After global recognition at the National Geographic Society’s 2026 Slingshot Challenge, Snake Speek plans to expand its snake conservation and awareness efforts

title: ‘Guess the climax if you can’: The day Bharathiraja challenged film critics
content: In a 2008’s press screening of Bommalattam in 2008, Bharathiraja threw a challenge to journalists: predict the climax if you can

title: Monsoon 2026 tracker LIVE: After strong onset, southwest monsoon to enter a sluggish phase in Kerala
content: The Meteorological Centre issued an orange alert for hailstorm, lightning and gusty winds in parts of Himachal Pradesh on June 11 and 12

title: Bond over Board: How board game nights are building a community in Visakhapatnam
content: A growing board game community in Visakhapatnam is creating spaces for friendship, conversation and screen-free fun

title: Bharathiraja passes away LIVE | Last rites with full state honours today
content: A towering personality in the film industry, Bharathiraja was fondly known as Iyakkunar Imayam (Pinnacle among Directors)

title: Firmly opposed to attacks on merchant shipping: India tells UNSC amid ongoing Iran conflict
content: Parvathaneni said India is firmly opposed to attacks on merchant shipping, as many of its nationals are prominent in its global workforce

title: Calcutta High Court gives relief to former Minister Aroop Biswas from coercive action in Messi event fiasco
content: The senior Trinamool leader has been asked to appear before the police for questioning and has been asked to submit his passport to the court

title: ‘Gross abuse of process of law’: HC quashes Delhi Police, ED cases against NewsClick
content: Justice Neena Bansal Krishna said the continuation of the FIR registered by the Delhi Police's Economic Offences Wing was "nothing but a gross abuse of the process of law"

title: Rebuilding a century-old library book by book
content: The Sree Chitra Thirunal Grandhasala is a rich repository of nearly 2 lakh rare books, old manuals, magazines, and other out-of-print publications that have been lost to history.

title: Meenakshi Natarajan nomination: Congress leaders eyeing RS seat ‘spoilt’ chances of party nominee, says M.P. CM
content: The Congress alleged that Ms. Natarajan’s nomination was rejected as part of a “premeditated conspiracy” and all its 62 MLAs would call on President Droupadi Murmu in Delhi on Friday, June 12, to seek her intervention in the matter.

title: Delhi High Court grants bail to Kashmir human-rights activist Khuram Parvez in UAPA case
content: The court said the allegations against Khuram Parvez, though serious, were based on the statement of a co-accused-turned-approver, who claimed to be an NIA informer, and were yet to be tested in trial.

title: Mirwaiz expresses concern over deadly violence in PoK, calls for dialogue
content: “It is the responsibility of those in authority (in PoK) to listen, engage and peacefully resolve the matter, rather than allow it to escalate into violence, arbitrary arrests and loss of life,” said the Mirwaiz.

title: It is only through Bharathiraja’s films that we can see what the villages of Tamil Nadu were once like: Actor Sivakumar
content: “It was Bharathiraja who, for the first time, brought the villages of southern Tamil Nadu — especially those around Madurai — alive before our eyes”

title: India summons U.S. Deputy Chief of Mission after second ship attack in three days
content: “We condemn the attack on the commercial vessel Settebello off the coast of Oman,” the Ministry of External Affairs said in a statement.

title: Two Indian seafarers dead, one missing after U.S. attack on ship off Oman, says sailors’ union
content: India condemns attack, summons U.S. Embassy’s Deputy Chief of Mission Jason Meeks to lodge a “strong protest”

title: Fresh hearing ordered on plea seeking FIR against Rahul over remarks on Hindu god Ram
content: The petitioner accused Mr. Gandhi of referring to Lord Ram as a “mythological and fictional character” and stated that the comment deeply hurt the religious sentiments of Hindus and hence amounted to hate speech.

title: Rahul meets Abhishek Banerjee amid push for INDIA bloc coordination
content: Congress president Mallikarjun Kharge has also called for a meeting of his party colleagues on June 11; at June 8, the INDIA bloc met, and leaders called for better coordination and unity among partners

title: PM Modi credits ‘public maturity’ for NDA’s 12-year stable rule
content: Modi says ‘instability and turmoil’ before 2014 made the country ‘suffer immensely’, adding that govt. will make all efforts to fulfil the aspirations of youth, women, the middle class, and farmers

title: En iniya Thamizh makkale: unforgettable celluloid legacy of a son of the soil
content: Bharathiraja  inspired his assistant directors to carve their own path, and K. Bhagyaraj, R. Parthiban and Pandiarajan all evolved from the Bharathiraja school of thought

title: Bristol, York and UNSW get approval to set up campuses in India
content: Setting up of these campuses in India marks important step in advancing the internationalisation of education vision of NEP 2020, says Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan

title: Strong heroines, mellow heroes, engaging stories and fierce social commentary define Bharathiraja’s repertoire
content: With fresh eyes, groomed on a rural story line in the lush surroundings of Theni in south Tamil Nadu, Bharathiraja decided he was done with the conventional tropes of the hero, the baddie, and a hanger-on heroine

title: Bharathiraja and Ilaiyaraaja: a relationship that ebbed and flowed
content: Recalling the difficult days in a conversation with The Hindu in 2018, Ilaiyaraaja had said that in 1968, he, his brothers and a few friends boarded a bus to Chennai in search of a career in the film industry. The journey was anything but easy.

title: Trump congratulates Modi on becoming India's longest-serving elected PM
content: “He is a strong, healthy, and wise man, and will have many years of greatness and success ahead of him,” says the U.S. President

title: Congress to move Supreme Court against rejection of Meenakshi Natarajan’s Rajya Sabha nomination
content: Senior leaders Abhishek Manu Singhvi, who led the party’s legal arguments before the Election Commission, said the Congress had demonstrated that the Returning Officer’s decision was legally untenable and urged the ECI to reverse the decision

title: Tamil Nadu government promoted seven IAS officers without Centre’s approval, Union Ministry tells Madras High Court
content: It tells the Chief Justice’s Bench that appropriate administrative action would be taken irrespective of the dismissal of a PIL petition related to the issue

title: Complaint against Pantheerankavu toll plaza draws NHRC’s attention
content: Collector asked to examine allegations of staff misconduct, traffic delays, and safety deficiencies at the NH 66 facility and submit a report within eight days

title: Steps to improve functioning of Kozhikode MCH, general hospital
content: Minister visits hospitals: creation of Department of Reproductive Medicine at MCH to give a fillip to fertility treatment proposed

title: Operation Toofan: Kozhikode City police deploy K9 squad, drone unit to track down suspects
content: The frequency of field-level inspections will be increased in the coming days based on fresh intelligence inputs, say the police

title: Bengaluru seeks Centre’s nod for RRTS links to Mysuru, Tumakuru, Kolar
content: The proposal was among several key metro and transport infrastructure projects for which Mr. Shivakumar sought early approval from the Union government.

title: AIIMS recalls two syringe batches over quality concerns in a single month; probe sought
content: In a letter written to Union Health Minister J.P. Nadda, Member of Rajya Sabha Haris Beeran said that in the past month, two separate recall notices were issued within a span of three weeks for disposable 10 ml syringes with needles supplied by different manufacturers

title: Supreme Court says it cannot be a mute spectator, orders Kerala to take charge of tusker amid ownership row
content: Evidence submitted in court showed that an elephant had been used for commercial and ceremonial activities despite the temporary owner giving an undertaking that he would not do so

title: Ministry recommends capping of airports for privatisation
content: The recommendation was made last week in response to queries raised by government departments represented on the Public Private Partnership Appraisal Committee

title: Video Captures Moment When US Struck Tanker Carrying Indian Crew
content: A missile tore through the engine room of the oil tanker Settebello, setting off a fire onboard. The Palau-flagged vessel was sailing 20 nautical miles northeast of Omani port of Sohar when the incident occurred.

title: 'Abuse Of Law': Delhi High Court Cancels Probe Agency ED's Cases Against NewsClick
content: The Delhi High Court noted that a company in the business of digital print media was bound to incur expenses on payment of salary, consultation fee, rent, etc, and the allegation of siphoning was therefore not tenable.

title: 'Iran Unaware': Trump Says US Sneaked 100 Million Oil Barrels From Hormuz
content: The narrow waterway connecting the Gulf of Persia to Arabia has been under Iran's chokehold in retaliation for the US and Israeli attacks. One-fifth of the global oil passes through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Stock Market LIVE Updates, Sensex Today: Sensex Drops 300 Points As Oil Rises After Fresh US Strikes On Iran
content: Stock Market, Sensex, Share Market, Nifty LIVE Updates: Brent futures rose to $94.56 a barrel, while US WTI crude rallied to $91.73 a barrel.

title: On CCTV: Haryana Gym Owner Shot Dead, Attackers Fired 10 Rounds
content: The incident took place around 5:30 am when the victim, identified as Deepak, was training his students outside the gym.

title: Weather Today Live Updates: Delhi Braces For Fresh Rain Spell, Thunderstorms, Orange Alert Issued
content: Weather Updates Today: Palam recorded the highest gusty wind speed of 111 kilometres per hour during the evening hours, while the Pusa area reported maximum winds of 48 kilometres per hour.

title: "Morally Wrong, Miss You Didi": Trinamool Rebel's Message For Mamata Banerjee
content: Asked whether she felt conflicted, Shatabdi Roy said, "I feel politically I made the right decision. But emotionally and morally I'm wrong."

title: Centre Removes Excise Duty On Higher Ethanol Fuel. What It Means For You
content: The exemption comes as India steadily expands its biofuel programme to reduce dependence on imported crude oil and promote cleaner energy.

title: It's Raining Missiles Over Gulf. US, Iran Back In War Mode
content: In response, Iran's IRGC said that its aerospace force and navy have carried out a two-wave operational strike against US forces in the region

title: Man Kicks, Beats 8-Month Pregnant Wife In Dehradun, Unborn Child Dies
content: On Friday, a dispute broke out between Seema and Babloo during which the latter allegedly kicked and punched his wife in the abdomen and beat her with a wooden stick.

title: Tejas Fighter Jet Supply Chain Under Scanner, HAL Flags Forged Test Reports
content: The audit revealed that all 199 reports submitted by TEC Aero Devices between February 2023 and September 2023 were allegedly forged.

title: First Made-In-India C-295 Carries Out Maiden Test Flight
content: The first made-in-India C-295 military transport aircraft successfully completed its maiden flight, the Indian Air Force (IAF) said on Wednesday.

title: Bengal Politics LIVE Updates: "Politics Art Of Possibilities": Congress Leader On Trinamool Merger Buzz
content: West Bengal Politics LIVE Updates: Crisis within the party escalated dramatically with a full-blown rebellion in the legislature and Parliament wings.

title: Video: 2 Key Iran Water Reservoirs Attacked By US, Supply Hit For 20,000 Homes
content: The US carried out late-night strikes on Iran's Sirik after claiming that Iran downed an Army Apache helicopter off the coast of Oman.

title: Trump's "Bomb The S*** Out" Warning, Iran's "Turn Region Into Hell" Threat
content: According to Trump, Iranian leaders had called him directly last evening and asked him to stop a bombing wave against Iran.

title: Delhi Court Issues Notice To Magistrate Over Bias Allegations In 2 Cases
content: The court noted that the petitions contained allegations of bias against the presiding officer and directed that a copy of the transfer plea be sent to the magistrate concerned.

title: Trump Says US Wants "Meaningful Deal" With Iran As Tensions Escalate
content: President Donald Trump on Wednesday said the United States wants a "meaningful" and "effective" deal with Iran amid escalating tensions in the Middle East.

title: Iran Says Hormuz Is "Completely Closed" To All Ships After US Attacks
content: Iran's top joint military command announced the closure of the Strait of Hormuz on Thursday, including oil tankers and commercial ships, saying any vessel that will attempt passage will be shot at.

content: the new garbage tenders for Bengaluru led to the first face-off between the new Chief Minister D.K. Shivakumar and leader of Opposition in Karnataka Legislative Assembly . a complaint alleges a “39,000 Crore scam with a 10,000 Crore kickback” in the new Integrated Solid Waste .

title: Meet Fabrice Bellard: French engineer behind YouTube, Netflix and TikTok
content: Fabrice Bellard created technology that powers YouTube, Netflix and TikTok in 1972 . his creations sit deep beneath the internet's surface, largely invisible to the people who rely on them . he spent the past three decades doing something far less glamorous but arguably just as influential .

title: Rajya Sabha nominations: Congress delegation meets EC over Natarajan row
content: EC has powers under Article 324 of the Constitution to overturn the RO’s order, and it should be done immediately . a top lawyer said Section 33(A) of the Representation of People’s Act states that a candidate has to disclose only those cases that have a punishment of over two years .

title: As he achieves record, PM vows faster reforms
content: the BJP-led NDA gathered here to hail his achievements . he said stability and development at an unprecedented speed and scale had replaced Congress’s era of instability, scams and misgovernance . the 21st century belongs to Narendra Modi, it said .

title: 'Modi wants to erase Nehru's legacy': Jairam Ramesh, Sharad Pawar slam PM
content:
.

NEW DELHI: Mocking Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s claim of becoming the longest serving PM, Congress on Wednesday termed PM Modi a “millstone around India’s neck, presiding over the murder of democracy”. AICC spokesman Jairam Ramesh likened the achievements of Jawaharlal Nehru and PM Modi, to say that PM Modi has “a pathological fixation on Nehru” and wants to erase his legacy. Ramesh said under PM Modi, EC and a voter list are under threat, while scientific temper has been erased through the “destruction of educational institutions”. Sharad Pawar said an impression is being created that there is no leader of his stature. “Nehru’s contribution to nation building and freedom struggle cannot be forgotten and has to be respected. He cannot be compared with anyone else. Nehru spent several years in jail during the freedom struggle under leadership of Mahatma Gandhi,” he said.

End of Article

title: India lodges protest with US for ship attack as 3 Indians go missing
content: there were 24 Indian seafarers on board the Palau-flagged Settebello, which was struck by precision munitions while transiting the Gulf of Oman . the ministry of External affairs summoned US charge d’affaires Jason Meeks and delivered a formal demarche protesting what was the second attack in the past few days by US forces on a shipping vessel .
